Investments: Not more than twenty per cent corpus in any entity; No investment in associate entity; Monthly average corpus not less than one hundred crore rupees

Section 10A

Eligibility: 10 consecutive assessment years for export profits; 100% deduction for 5 years in special economic zone; 50% deduction for next 2 years
Conditions: Manufacture or production of articles or things or computer software; Export of articles or things or computer software; Assessment year beginning on or after April 1, 2003; Special economic zone
Exceptions: No deduction allowed for assessment years beginning on or after April 1, 2012; No deduction allowed if return not furnished by due date
Investments: Special Economic Zone Re-investment Allowance Reserve Account

Section 10AA

Eligibility: Unit begins to manufacture or produce articles or things or provide services; assessment year commencing on or after the 1st day of April, 2006, but before the first day of April, 2021
Conditions: amount credited to the Special Economic Zone Re-investment Reserve Account is utilised for acquiring machinery or plant within three years; amount utilised until acquisition of machinery or plant for business purposes other than distribution by way of dividends or profits or remittance outside India; particulars furnished by assessee in respect of machinery or plant along with return of income
Exceptions: no deduction allowed to an assessee who does not furnish a return of income on or before the due date specified under sub-section (1) of section 139
Investments: Special Economic Zone Re-investment Reserve Account; acquiring machinery or plant

Section 10B

Eligibility: Hundred per cent export-oriented undertaking; Manufactures or produces articles or things or computer software
Conditions: Sale proceeds of exported goods received in convertible foreign exchange within 6 months
Exceptions: Undertaking formed as a result of re-establishment, reconstruction or revival of existing business; Assessee who does not furnish return of income on or before due date; Not formed by splitting up, or reconstruction, of a business already in existence; Not formed by transfer to a new business of machinery or plant previously used
Investments:

Section 10BA

Eligibility: Manufactures or produces eligible articles or things without imported raw materials; Not formed by splitting up or reconstruction of existing business; Re-established, reconstructed, or revived business in specified circumstances and period; Not formed by transfer of machinery or plant to new business; 90% or more sales are exports; 20 or more workers employed during the previous year
Conditions: Eligible articles or things exported out of India; Sale proceeds received in convertible foreign exchange within 6 months or further period allowed; Export turnover bears same proportion to total business turnover as deduction amount; Accountant's report furnished with return of income
Exceptions: Not admissible if section 10A or 10B deduction claimed for same assessment year; Not admissible for assessment years beginning on April 1, 2010 and subsequent years
Investments:

Section 10C

Eligibility: Manufacturing or production on or after April 1, 1998; Integrated Infrastructure Development Centre or Industrial Growth Centre located in North-Eastern Region
Conditions: Provided that re-establishment, reconstruction, or revival is allowed; Explanation 1 and Explanation 2 to sub-section (3) of section 80-IA apply
Exceptions: No inclusion in total income for ten consecutive assessment years; Section 32, Section 35, and clause (ix) of sub-section (1) of Section 36 apply as if deductions were given full effect; No loss carried forward or set off where it relates to the business of the industrial undertaking; No deduction under sections 80HH, 80HHA, 80-I, 80-IA, 80-IB, and 80JJA in relation to profits and gains; Not formed by splitting up or reconstruction of existing business; Not formed by transferring machinery or plant previously used for any purpose
Investments:

Exceptions: Rs. 1,00,000 under Section 80C
Investments: Public Provident Fund (PPF); National Pension System (NPS); Unit Linked Insurance Plan (ULIP)

Section 32A

Eligibility: owned by the assessee; wholly used for the purposes of the business carried on by him
Conditions: new ship or new aircraft acquired after the 31st day of March, 1976; new machinery or plant installed after the 31st day of March, 1976; installed in any office premises or any residential accommodation; any office appliances or road transport vehicles; ship, machinery or plant in respect of which the deduction by way of development rebate is allowable under section 33; whole of the actual cost of which is allowed as a deduction (whether by way of depreciation or otherwise)
Exceptions: ship or aircraft or machinery or plant specified in sub-section (8B); acquired, or installed after the 31st day of March, 1987 but before the 1st day of April, 1988; acquired or installed in the circumstances specified in clause (a) of sub-section (8B)
Investments: twenty-five per cent of the actual cost of the ship, aircraft, machinery or plant to the assessee

Section 32AB

Eligibility: Profits and gains of business or profession; Deposited amount in deposit account before expiry of six months
Conditions: Income chargeable to tax under head 'Profits and gains of business or profession'; Business carried on by assessee for growing and manufacturing tea in India
Exceptions: No deduction allowed for assessment year commencing on 1st April, 1991, or any subsequent year; Deduction not allowed to partners or members in case of firms, associations, or bodies
Investments: Purchase of new ship, aircraft, machinery, or plant; Deposits made in deposit account under specific scheme

Section 32AC

Eligibility: Assessee must be a company; Engaged in manufacture or production of articles or things
Conditions: New asset acquired after 31st March, 2013 but before 1st April, 2015; Aggregate amount of actual cost exceeds ₹100 crore; Asset installed on or before 31st March, 2017; Amount of actual cost exceeds ₹25 crore
Exceptions: No deduction if sold/ transferred within 5 years from installation date; Exclusion of plant/machinery used by others or in office/residential premises
Investments:

Section 32AD

Eligibility: manufacture or production of any article or thing; backward area notified by the Central Government; 1st day of April, 2015 to 31st day of March, 2020
Conditions: new asset acquired and installed in backward area; new asset sold or transferred within 5 years
Exceptions: plant or machinery used before installation by assessee; office premises or residential accommodation; office appliances, computers, computer software; whole of actual cost allowed as deduction; actual cost of new asset not more than 15%
Investments: new plant or machinery (other than ship or aircraft); backward area in AP, Bihar, Telangana, WB

Section 33A

Eligibility: Assessee carries on business of growing and manufacturing tea in India; Planting of tea bushes commenced after 31st March, 1965; Planting of tea bushes completed before 1st April, 1990
Conditions: Total income must be nil or less than development allowance calculated under sub-section (1); No portion of development allowance to be carried forward for more than eight assessment years
Exceptions: No deduction under clause (i) allowed unless planting commenced after 31st March, 1965 and completed before 1st April, 1990; No deduction under clause (ii) allowed unless planting commenced after 31st March, 1965 and completed before 1st April, 1970
Investments: Planting of tea bushes on any land in India owned by assessee; Replanting of tea bushes on any land already planted with tea bushes

Section 33AB

Eligibility: assessee carrying on business of growing and manufacturing tea or coffee or rubber; deposit with the National Bank an amount in an account maintained by the assessee; approved scheme by the Tea Board or Coffee Board or Rubber Board
Conditions: accounts of such business audited by an accountant before specified date; report of audit furnished by that date
Exceptions: no deduction if already allowed under this sub-section in any previous year; no deduction admissible unless accounts audited and report furnished; amount standing to credit of assessee in special account or Deposit Account not allowed to be withdrawn except for purposes specified
Investments: scheme approved by Tea Board or Coffee Board or Rubber Board; account opened with the previous approval of Central Government; special account maintained by National Bank

Section 33ABA

Eligibility: Carrying on business with Central Government agreement; Depositing amount in special account or Site Restoration Account
Conditions: Accounting audit by an accountant before specified date; Furnishing audit report in prescribed form within specified date; Compliance with other laws for accounting audit
Exceptions: No deduction if already allowed in previous year; No withdrawal of amount except for specified purposes
Investments: Deposits in special account or Site Restoration Account

Section 33AC

Eligibility: public company formed and registered in India with main object of carrying on business of operation of ships
Conditions: No deduction allowed for assessment year commencing on or after April 1, 2005
Exceptions: Assessees with excess amounts in reserve account are not eligible for deduction; Deduction not allowed for five years from April 1, 2001 to March 31, 2006; No deduction allowed if ship is sold or transferred before three years from acquisition; Profits derived from business of operation of ships must not exceed fifty per cent; Aggregate amounts carried to reserve account cannot exceed twice aggregate paid-up share capital, general reserves, and share premium account
Investments: Amounts credited to reserve account must be utilised within eight years; Utilisation of amounts for acquiring new ship or other business purposes allowed; Sale proceeds from ship sale after expiry of three years can be used for acquiring new ship

Section 33B

Eligibility: Business discontinued due to damage/destruction; Re-established, reconstructed, or revived within 3 years
Conditions: Damage/destruction due to flood, typhoon, hurricane, cyclone, earthquake, etc.; Damage/destruction due to riot, civil disturbance, accidental fire, explosion, etc.; Action by an enemy or combating an enemy
Exceptions: Assessment year commencing on April 1, 1985, or subsequent years

Section 35A

Eligibility: In respect of any expenditure of a capital nature incurred after the 28th day of February, 1966 but before the 1st day of April, 1998; On the acquisition of patent rights or copyrights used for the purposes of the business
Conditions: Relevant previous years are the fourteen previous years beginning with the previous year in which such expenditure is incurred; Where the rights commenced prior to the previous year in which expenditure was incurred, clause shall have effect with a substitution
Exceptions: No deduction under sub-section (1) shall be allowed where the rights come to an end without being subsequently revived or are sold in their entirety and the proceeds of the sale are less than the cost; Where the whole or any part of the rights is sold and the proceeds of the sale exceed the amount of the cost of acquisition thereof remaining unallowed, so much of the excess as does not exceed the di
Investments: Patent rights or copyrights; Relevant previous years

Eligibility: Lump sum consideration paid for acquiring know-how; Transfer of undertaking under amalgamation or demerger

Investments: Deductible from expenditure in relevant previous years; Excess proceeds chargeable to income-tax as profits and gains; Proceeds of Transfer

Exceptions: Withdrawal of approval does not deny deduction; Deduction denied if project/scheme is not carried out as approved

Eligibility: Indian company or person resident in India; Expenditure incurred after March 31, 1970

Eligibility: Payment to employee in voluntary retirement scheme; Amalgamation or demerger scheme
Conditions: One-fifth deduction in first year; Balance deducted in equal instalments for next four years; No deduction in previous year of amalgamation, demerger or succession; Conditions laid down in section 47
Exceptions: Expenditure not allowed under any other provision of this Act

Section 35E

Eligibility: Indian company or a person (other than a company) who is resident in India; operations relating to prospecting for, or extraction or production of, any mineral
Conditions: expenditure incurred after the 31st day of March, 1970; expenditure wholly and exclusively on operations relating to prospecting for minerals or development of a mine; no sale, salvage, compensation or insurance moneys realised in respect of any property or rights
Exceptions: expenditure on acquisition of site or deposits of mineral or group of associated minerals; expenditure on capital assets such as building, machinery, plant or furniture for which depreciation is admissible; no portion of expenditure met directly or indirectly by another person or authority
